title: Who's News: Strategic Advisory Appointments at LFI and BTQ Technologies
gist: LFI appointed defense/manufacturing veteran Michael Datta to its Board of Advisors to drive commercial traction for its Quantum Value Stages™ strategy; BTQ Technologies named DoD/NSC/In-Q-Tel veteran Brandt Pasco as U.S. Strategic Advisor for Post-Quantum Cryptography to align with NIST-approved PQC federal deployment.

themes.theme: Quantum sector advisory moves and federal PQC pipeline

insights.claim: LFI appointed Michael Datta—a 20-year defense and manufacturing veteran active in the US-Australia corridor—to its Board of Advisors, tasked with converting LFI's Quantum Value Stages™ strategy into commercial revenue with clients.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: LFI is signaling a pivot from R&D to commercial execution in defense/manufacturing; US-Australia quantum corridor is an emerging strategic axis worth tracking.
insights.locator: LFI has appointed Michael Datta to its Board of Advisors

insights.claim: BTQ Technologies appointed Brandt Pasco—whose background includes the Department of Defense, National Security Council, and In-Q-Tel—as U.S. Strategic Advisor for Post-Quantum Cryptography to lead federal engagement as national infrastructure transitions to NIST-approved PQC standards.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: BTQ is positioning directly for U.S. federal PQC contracts; In-Q-Tel background is a strong signal of intelligence-community access and credibility.
insights.locator: BTQ Technologies has appointed Brandt Pasco as U.S. Strategic Advisor

insights.claim: BTQ's PQC advisory appointment is explicitly tied to recent U.S. executive orders accelerating quantum innovation and PQC adoption, indicating the federal procurement pipeline for quantum-safe cryptography is actively opening.
insights.speaker: Mohamed Abdel-Kareem
insights.so_what: Federal PQC mandates are creating a procurement wave; BTQ is positioning as a full-stack PQC supplier for government deployment.
insights.quote: The appointment is directly aligned with recent U.S. executive orders accelerating quantum innovation and PQC adoption.
insights.locator: The appointment is directly aligned with recent U.S. executive orders
